name: scene
title: Scene 🗺️🎶
description: Location-based event discovery platform connecting micro-venue hosts and independent artists with local audiences. Map-driven, RSVP-enforced, social-graph-aware.
imageAlt: Three Scene iPhone screens: sign-in, live event map of Bushwick, and an RSVP event list

name: legal-intake-orchestrator
title: Legal Intake Orchestrator
description: Problem: Large firms like Morgan & Morgan process 10,000+ monthly client inquiries. Each one typically requires 15 minutes of paralegal time for classification, validation, and draft generation.

name: wave-energy-forecasting-ai
title: Panthalassa Buoy AI 🌊⚡
description: AI-powered ocean wave forecasting for renewable energy Panthalassa Buoy AI uses advanced machine learning trained on Copernicus Marine and NOAA datasets to predict wave activity and identify optimal deployment sites for the 200-ft Panthalassa energy-harvesting buoy.
imageAlt: Panthalassa dashboard showing data pipeline status and wave power analysis results

name: Open-Crib.Frontend
title: OpenCrib 🏠✨
description: OpenCrib is an iOS-first platform for anyone who wants to host events, share their space, or bring people together. From house shows and backyard parties to art pop-ups, workshops, or casual meetups, OpenCrib makes it easy to open your door to a community that cares.
imageAlt: Three OpenCrib iPhone screens: event map, host profile, and party creation form

name: SEDS-FIU
title: Mission Control Frontend 🚀
description: This repository contains the frontend software for a Mission Control system developed as part of a senior Capstone project. The full project involved designing and implementing a custom microcontroller board for amateur rocketry, with the goal of enabling gas-propellant, self-landing rockets.
imageAlt: Mission control interface graphing live tank pressures and weights during a test

name: chatbot-saas-web-
title: Jetstone AI — Chatbot SaaS 🤖
description: The chatbot platform behind my business, Jetstone AI. A drop-in AI chatbot for business websites: an embeddable widget with customizable behavior on a backend built to scale — add the script, configure the bot, done.
imageAlt: Chatbot Pro landing page: your business, running 24/7 — without hiring more staff
